programme.title: Street Outlaws: Win One for the Team

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: A Bumpy Start
programme.desc: JJ's son Doughboy questions whether to continue racing after a devasting crash. Bad weather ends a race early.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Jack's Gold Shack

programme.title: Gold Rush: Treasure Island
programme.desc: Parker and his foreman Rick take a chance on a new cut. Todd searches for a fix so he can stop losing gold out of the sluicebox. Tony's crew hits a huge snag with the dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: El Dorado Dream
programme.desc: Jack gets to chase his dream at El Dorado, the richest documented creek in North America. Parker's crew pushes hard in attempt to have Treasure Island live up to its name. Tony discovers his dredge is pouring gold out of its sluices.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: New Frontiers, New Threats
programme.desc: Spring arrives early in Alaska and the Kilchers are forced to prepare their homestead. And 3,000 miles away, Idaho's River of No Return roars back to life and the people who live on its shores must navigate the raging spring rapids.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mammoth Channel
programme.desc: The Hoffman crew uncovers a unique potential sign of good gold. Parker refuses to give up on Treasure Island and a fight between Tony and his crew spells the end for some of his crew.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mammoth Gold
programme.desc: Todd's crew discovers that finding prehistoric mammoth tusks brings very good luck. Tony is forced to rebuild his wash plant and Parker opens the biggest cut of his life in an attempt to get more gold than his rival Todd.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's 21st
programme.desc: Parker celebrates his 21st birthday with a big new toy. Tony looks into a new investment and Todd gets a wakeup call.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Captain Monica
programme.desc: Monica takes over as captain of Tony's 350 ton dredge. Parker struggles to haul in his monster new wash plant and the Hoffman crew is plagued by tailings.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Crew War
programme.desc: Parker's new mechanic sparks a mutiny. A drought shuts down Todd's operation and Tony faces a major issue that could put him out of business.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Goldzilla Gold
programme.desc: A series of breakdowns pits the Hoffman's day crew against the night shift. Parker's wash plant continues to produce pay but his crew starts falling apart. Tony and Gene go head to head over how to run the dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Expanding the Operation
programme.desc: Parker visits his rival Todd to make a wager on who will get the most gold. Later, mining legend Tony Beets reveals a new addition to his operation, an antique mining dredge, but finds out it's missing a critical component.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Bet It All
programme.desc: Parker makes an ambitious payment to his landlord that puts a lot of pressure on his team to hit their season goal. Meanwhile, the Hoffmans attempt to open new ground and quickly find themselves in a muddy mess.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Smother's Day
programme.desc: Samantha wants a dress that shows off her tattoo, but her mom hates the tattoo and wants to keep it covered. Singer Vanessa needs a 1930's dress for her jazz-inspired wedding. With only a month to go, Aja's fitting leaves no margin for error.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Top My Dream Dress!
programme.desc: Three brides hope Kleinfeld can top the dream dresses they've already found. Lucille found a satin dress, but still wants more bling. Dana is head-over-heels for a tulle gown her mom hates. Joan loves a dress back home but wants one unique to Kleinfeld.

programme.title: The First 48: A Serial Killer Calls
programme.desc: Homicide detectives are drawn into a deadly cat-and-mouse game with a serial killer who calls 911 to reveal to the police where he's hidden bodies in Kansas City.

programme.title: The First 48: Gun Fight/ The Ring
programme.desc: In Kansas City, Mo., a man is shot dead during a gun fight. Detectives work the brutal stabbing of a young mother killed in her own bedroom.

programme.title: The First 48: Deadly Ride/ Wrong Place, Wrong Time
programme.desc: When a Cleveland man is shot while driving his car, detectives search four states to find his killer. In Miami, a man is gunned down, but detectives have to rely on tight-lipped citizens to solve the murder.

programme.title: The First 48: A Simple Plan/ Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: An attempted car jacking in Cleveland leaves an innocent man shot dead. Then, a home invasion turns deadly when a woman is murdered in front of her daughter.

programme.title: Kids Who Kill
programme.desc: Looks into the minds of child killers and tells the intense, personal stories of young murderers, their victims and the families involved. Experts debate over punishment versus rehabilitation, and the competence of the adolescent brain.

programme.title: Sentenced to Life: Teen Killers
programme.desc: Children charged with murder can be convicted as adults and sentenced to spend life behind bars, without the chance of parole. The 2015 Supreme Court ruling controversially gives child lifers the chance to walk free, by giving them a resentencing hearing.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Special
programme.desc: Otis' attorney works to strike a deal to make him eligible for parole. Kristel has a resentencing hearing for her role in the 1999 murder of Cordell, while his family testifies against her. Kristel's co-defendant, Ronald, learns his fate.

programme.title: The First 48: Dead End Drive/ The Fixer
programme.desc: Dallas Detective Dwayne Thompson hunts for a band of carjacking killers that are terrorizing a neighbourhood. In Cleveland, an argument among friends spins out of control when one of them makes a deadly decision.

programme.title: The First 48: Graveyard Love
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a man is ambushed in front of his grandmother's house. Detectives suspect a woman close to the victim may have arranged the shooting, but they need hard evidence to prove it, and quickly before it's too late.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: So many shoppers in the candy aisle during 'Star Struck'. The celeb that was on set while the guys filmed 'Brain Games'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Holy Moly Mirror
programme.desc: In a local Chicago diner, Michael brings new meaning to the term 'hold the pickles.' Plus, he discovers an aggressive new breed of fungus at Humboldt Park.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Soliciting Statue
programme.desc: At an antique store, Michael shows off an impossible way to organize your clothes, and back at the supermarket we find out that there are some serious surprises lurking in our favorite foods.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Positive Presence
programme.desc: Learn which trick Michael has been performing since he was a child, who embarked on a 21-day juice diet cleanse and what moment had everyone on set erupting with laughter.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Living Trilobite
programme.desc: Find out which trick went viral on a hip-hop blog, what word is hard for Michael to pronounce and what degree Michael earned in college.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Waddle, a Scratch ...
programme.desc: Find out the record for the most people Michael has tricked at once, where he gets his BS skills from, and how he puts his artistic abilities to use.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Lizard Law
programme.desc: Never before seen footage; a severed camera cable; the magic team messing with Michael during a trick.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Out of Control
programme.desc: Find out how Michael makes himself sound like an expert, what he loves collecting and how the magic team surprised the rest of the crew.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Amvox 73
programme.desc: Find out what location was right next to an airport and a golf course, which animals kept getting loose on set and what other animal was camera shy.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: No Man's Land
programme.desc: It's fall in the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge, and that means animals are on the move. Heimo pursues the tail end of the caribou migration, a bear ransacks Bob's cabin, destroying 2 years of dry meat, and the Lewis family arrives to sign of moose.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Hunted
programme.desc: Surviving 400 miles from civilization boils down to one thing, finding food. Heimo pursues a moose, which can feed him and Edna for months. The condition of Bob's boat threatens the hunt. The Seldens arrive to a flooded cabin.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: Winter's wrath is nearing and to prepare for the unforgiving season when temperatures drop to -50 degrees, everyone must fight to stay alive.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Everything Is Hungry
programme.desc: Winter is here and the time for preparation is over. Bob deals with the ramifications of crashing his plane. To begin trapping, Heimo must find a way to cross a newly frozen river. Ray and his daughters set out to catch much needed meat.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Last Sunset
programme.desc: The cost of life hundreds of miles from civilization is front and center. Tyler and Ashley trek 15 miles to a lake cabin to run their dog team and search for food. Bob leaves home to see his daughter and assess the damage of his crashed plane.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Into the Darkness
programme.desc: Day one of darkness has arrived in the refuge. Heimo's golden rule to never get caught miles from home in the dark is in jeopardy. The Lewis Family prepares for a life changing event as their daughters prepare to leave and head out on their own in town.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Nothing Lasts Forever
programme.desc: As they near the end of winter, the refuge residents look toward the future. Bob trains his pup Ruger to be a hunting dog, while Ray prepares for an empty nest life without his daughters. Heimo's ambitious mind pushes his aging body to the brink.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Last Sunset
programme.desc: The cost of life hundreds of miles from civilization is front and center. Tyler and Ashley trek 15 miles to a lake cabin to run their dog team and search for food. Bob leaves home to see his daughter and assess the damage of his crashed plane.

programme.desc: The cost of life hundreds of miles from civilization is front and center. Tyler and Ashley trek 15 miles to a lake cabin to run their dog team and search for food. Bob leaves home to see his daughter and assess the damage of his crashed plane.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Sidewinders of Arizona
programme.desc: The Sidewinder is both an aggressive, venomous snake and an important missile used by the U.S. Air Force. Steve and Terri locate these swift, desert-dwelling snakes in Arizona. Then Steve flies an F16 armed with the military version of the Sidewinder.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Top 20 Kittens
programme.desc: A countdown of the twenty most adorable kittens.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Posey the Terror
programme.desc: Jackson faces the highest stakes of the series when he experiences the vicious claws of a troubled cat who's terrorizing a family about to bring home a newborn baby; Jackson meets an inspirational cat named Skinny; Jackson meets Cole and Marmalade.

programme.title: The Zoo: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Leo, a snow leopard rescued from Pakistan, is having trouble eating because of a broken canine. The bird department works feverishly to restore a beehive for the bee-eater birds. Ambassador Center staff work with an adorable fennec fox named Charlie.

programme.title: The Zoo: Back to Africa
programme.desc: Zoo staff make the journey to east Africa to return to the wild thousands of toads they helped rescue from extinction. Utu, the test-pilot giraffe, tries out a new piece of equipment. And the bird department works to save the lives of millions of birds.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Marvelous Mott Mott
programme.desc: Max, a beloved camel, develops a large abscess on the top of his head. An adorable marmot prepares for her first classroom visit as an ambassador animal. Later, a peregrine falcon found at the base of skyscraper is bought to the zoo for a health check.

programme.title: Give a Dog a Home: Live!
programme.desc: There are thousands of animals in shelters across the U.S. in need of good, loving homes. Now Animal Planet, with Best Friends Animal Society, wants to connect these animals directly to our viewers, live and in real time.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Home at Last
programme.desc: Villalobos' oldest resident, Summer, a pit with severe arthritis, has a chance at a forever home. Earl works to improve a dog's social skills, hoping to make him more adoptable. And Kanani's girlfriend, M2, takes on her first rescue.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Dogs Who Made Us
programme.desc: This special episode takes a look at the dogs that will always hold a loving place in the family's hearts. From the first pit bull that Tia rescued to the dog that walked Tania down the aisle, family members share why each dog is so important to them.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Truth or Consequences
programme.desc: In New Hampshire, Officer Glen Lucas investigates a dispute between a turkey hunter and an eyewitness. Sergeant Todd Szewczyk hunts down a trespassing target shooter and Officers McKee and Matson fish for the truth from trespassing ATV riders.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Run
programme.desc: In New Hampshire, Officer Hannett pursues an unusual recreational vehicle in a high speed chase. Officer Pushee and Trainee Driscoll encounter a group of combative speedsters and Officer Lucas races to the scene of an ATV crash.

programme.title: Movie: Hustle and Flow
programme.desc: An aging pimp from Memphis named DJay has aspirations of becoming a successful rapper. When he learns that a famous rap star is coming to his area, DJay attempts to grab his attention and fulfil his dream.

programme.title: Movie: White Chicks
programme.desc: Two disgraced FBI agents go way undercover as white women in an effort to protect hotel heiresses, the Wilson Sisters, from a kidnapping plot.

programme.title: Movie: All Eyez on Me
programme.desc: The true story of musician Tupac Shakur's life. Raised by activists, the young black man grew up to be a poet, actor and one of the world's most successful rappers whose impact has only grown since his death, turning him into a global cultural icon.

programme.title: Martin: Baby, It's You
programme.desc: Martin agrees to host a baby shower for Gina's expecting friend at his apartment.

programme.title: Martin: Workin' Day and Night
programme.desc: Stan, Tommy and Cole convince Martin that Gina controls his life. To prove them wrong, he starts working double shifts at the radio station, which is exactly what Gina didn't want.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret World of Nebulas
programme.desc: Nebulas are the strange structures of cosmic gas and dust where stars are born and die, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Life and Death on the Red Planet
programme.desc: Life once existed on Mars, but a series of devastating mass extinctions have made present-day life nearly impossible. The latest science shows how Martian life keeps bouncing back as it transforms from a blue watery world like Earth into a desert planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Uranus and Neptune: Rise of the Ice Giants
programme.desc: Uranus and Neptune are mysterious, icy worlds at the edge of our solar system, and new discoveries reveal that these strange planets might have helped start life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the dark secrets inside the universe’s most sinister black holes, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate how these monsters can warp time, space, and all life on earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Did the Big Bang Really Happen?
programme.desc: New discoveries are causing astronomers to question if the Big Bang really happened, and using the latest science, they investigate if it wasn't just the start of our universe but many mysterious multiverses.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How Black Holes Made Us
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that Black holes might have been essential to creating stars, giving light, and building the universe itself, and aren't the violent monsters we think they are.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes
programme.desc: Delve into the mysteries of the most destructive force in the heavens; black holes were once only speculation and now modern astronomy is proving them frighteningly real and showing that they may well shape everything we see.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Did the Big Bang Really Happen?
programme.desc: New discoveries are causing astronomers to question if the Big Bang really happened, and using the latest science, they investigate if it wasn't just the start of our universe but many mysterious multiverses.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Interstellar Mysteries
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that interstellar space, the space between the universe's stars, is not empty and unremarkable as previously thought, but full of weird objects and strange phenomena that might hold the darkest secrets of our cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Alien Moons
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it. In this brand new episode, up to date information on alien moons is given. They offer perhaps the best chance of finding alien life in the Universe - and they exist in the billions.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The First Oceans
programme.desc: A discovery suggests the true origins of Earth's oceans are far more exotic than anyone ever imagined.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Megastorms
programme.desc: In our quest to discover if we are alone in the universe, we shouldn't just look for worlds, we should look for weather. Find chaotic weather and maybe we will find alien life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Dark Matter Enigma
programme.desc: Dark matter is the biggest mystery of the cosmos. Scientists know that it has been vital to our universe since its birth, and new discoveries reveal that it could create black holes, cause mass extinctions, and might even shape life on Earth itself.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Twin Suns: The Alien Mysteries
programme.desc: Planets that orbit two suns instead of one might be deadly hell worlds, but new discoveries reveal that sci-fi star systems with binary stars might be optimal places for alien life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: War on Asteroids
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting-edge technology to stop an asteroid apocalypse, and for the first time, mankind is closer than ever to keeping Earth safe from these killer space rocks.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Pluto
programme.desc: The first close-up images of Pluto revealed the unimaginable secrets of this mysterious frozen world. Now, scientists investigate if Pluto is home to a warm ocean of liquid water beneath its surface, and whether this underground ocean could harbor life.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Giants: Epic Earth Mover

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Murder Has Two Faces
programme.desc: When her husband cuts her off financially, Diane Hart turns to her older sister for help. Together, the sisters come up with a deadly plan to get at the money Diane feels she deserves.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Exposed
programme.desc: Three young girls meet a new friend online. Like other boys in the chat rooms, he's around their age, friendly, and flirtatious. Months later his demeanor shifts, trapping the girls in a vicious game from which they can't escape.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder Among Friends

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Presents: Homicide: City Hall Massacre

programme.desc: A teenager commits suicide. And, in the aftermath, his parents discover an online relationship far deeper and far darker than they had realized.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Presents: Homicide: Murder in the Memphis Mansion
programme.desc: Mystery hits Memphis when a socialite is murdered. Tangled in a web of money, drugs and revenge, suspects emerge but all the answers may be found closest to the crime scene.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: 'Til Death Do Us Part" takes on a whole new meaning when a wife of thirty-four years loses the love of her life after he's kidnapped and she's nearly killed by his abductor. But nothing is what it seems in this gothic tale of murder, deceit and cover-up.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Everybody's Daughter
programme.desc: When Kate Johnson is murdered in her dorm room, detectives are stumped why this innocent young woman was targeted. After taking 400 DNA samples and establishing a secret task force, detectives track down Kate's killer and get their chilling answer.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Rage in Rose City
programme.desc: A home invasion turns deadly with the near decapitation of a young man. Portland homicide detectives can't rule out the victim's best friend and girlfriend as suspects, until several other suspects come to light in a case of personal and brutal overkill.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: The Affairs of Soldiers
programme.desc: A soldier comes home with his five year old son and finds his wife, an Army Officer stationed at Fort Bliss in El Paso, Texas, brutally stabbed to death.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Monsters Among Friends
programme.desc: A popular high school cheerleader from a rural Oklahoma town slips out her bedroom window after having a few angry words with her mother. She is never seen alive again.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: After decades of UFO research focusing on the skies, Unidentified Submergible Objects may be the next frontier of study. Newly declassified documents and first-hand accounts are leading researchers to believe that UFOs may be closer than we ever thought.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.desc: The crew of Lancaster ME669 had one of the most dangerous jobs in the Air Force.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flipping in the Big Easy
programme.desc: Two friends and stay-at-home moms decide to flip their first house together in New Orleans, Louisiana, but their conflicting design styles and schedule test the limits of their friendship. They'll have to find a way to compromise to finish on time.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: In the Trenches
programme.desc: A husband-and-wife team goes way over on schedule and budget when permit applications with the city don't go as expected. Finding themselves at a standstill with what work they can accomplish, the wife starts to worry this flip will never end.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: When Duty Calls
programme.desc: Busy parents attempt their first flip in Kettering, OH, but things get hectic balancing life at home, their landscaping business and the flip's short schedule. When he's constantly pulled away with his day job, she's worried they won't be able to finish.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: A Rotten Flip
programme.desc: A young couple discovers pest damage while flipping a four-bedroom bungalow in the seaside town of Newport, North Carolina. Fixing the rot is a major hit to their budget and adds to their never-ending list of projects.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: All Play, No Flip
programme.desc: A real estate agent and her energetic husband start their first flip in Jackson, Tennessee. Surprise structural damage, electrical problems and mold turn a one-month project into a ten-month ordeal.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Bugging Out Over Beams
programme.desc: A married couple flips a gutted ranch-style home in Owasso, Oklahoma. The discovery of termite damage puts this flip behind schedule and over budget from the start.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1785 Master Suite Rework
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited to open up a cramped master suite and rework the layout to make room for a huge walk-in shower. He and his team hope to expose a hidden original fireplace and find some additional stone in the bathroom.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s Entryway Transformation
programme.desc: A couple calls on Jeff Devlin and his team to restore their historic dining room and exterior facade. Jeff adds tons of historic charm to the exterior and completely transforms the dining room with a custom-built mud room nook.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Parrish Job
programme.desc: Celeste Parrish wants to renovate her outdated master bathroom and has called in her friend Angela to help. These two novice DIYers quickly learn about the ups and downs of renovation.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Partch Job
programme.desc: Kat and Ron Partch want to open up their tiny kitchen to create an open space for entertaining their friends. But, as they demolish their walls and ceilings, they run into electrical and structural problems.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Peters Job
programme.desc: Rick and Sarah Peters have been waiting for years to renovate their ugly kitchen and now, they're finally ready to rip out the old and bring in the new. They start off strong, but as time starts running out, this renovation becomes a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Zentz Job
programme.desc: Eric and Kara have found the perfect home, except for the ugly, dated kitchen. They have plants to modernize the place, but when they tear in, all their plans go out the window. Eric and Kara race to finish installing their kitchen.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Burlingame Job
programme.desc: Rich and Raelynn Burlingame have decided to tackle their biggest renovation project yet. They demolish their current living room and put a new kitchen in its place.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Ciriello Job
programme.desc: Anna Ciriello and her boyfriend, Drew, love their home, but the one thing they do not love is their cracked, ugly, old patio. They decide to completely tear it out and start over from scratch, replacing it with a new paved patio.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Dickman Job
programme.desc: Joe and Krystina Dickman just bought the perfect house in the perfect neighbourhood. The only problem is the house's ugly, yellow kitchen is far from perfect.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Harris Job
programme.desc: Mike Harris and his girlfriend, Beth Solomon, want to update the dingy, old kitchen in their condo. Though neither of them have very much renovation experience they are determined to create a modern, hip space.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Howard Job
programme.desc: Josh Howard has recruited his wife, Jenifer, to help him build the man-cave of his dreams. They plan to level the area by his man-made pond and build Josh's man-cave from the ground up, but from the beginning, this renovation is plagued with setbacks.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Jenkins Job
programme.desc: Stories of the hard and sometimes crazy work that goes into home renovations.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The King Job
programme.desc: Jen King and her sister, Jackie, set out to remodel Jen's disgusting, basement bathroom and they are confident that they can get it done. They start of strong but things take a turn for the worse, ending with a trip to the emergency room.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Krenk Job
programme.desc: Jay and Sherri Krenk just bought a new home in the country and are ready to start renovating their new kitchen, so they can move in.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Martin Job, Part III
programme.desc: Matt Martin wants to decorate his home for the holidays with the help of his mother, Janice. They start off strong, but when unexpected challenges arise, Matt is worried he might not finish in time.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Nyenbrink Job
programme.desc: David and Lindsey Nyenbrink want to replace their outdated, pink kitchen. They think it's going to be a piece of take, but the reality is it's a fight against the odds to get their kitchen completed in time.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Saslow Job
programme.desc: Frank Saslow enlists his brother-in-law to help him renovate his boring beachfront condo.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Scheman Job
programme.desc: Nicole Scheman just bought the perfect old house on Main Street, but the only thing it's missing is a screened in front porch. She recruits her dad the to help her convert the front room but they're overcome with frustrations of an old home.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Ben & Ginger: Lessons in Kitchen Renovation
programme.desc: They finally purchased the home of their dreams, but 'Good Morning America' Chief Meteorologist Ginger Zee and her husband Ben Aaron are about to learn some hard lessons as they begin renovating the kitchen.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Ben & Ginger: Keeping An Eye Out
programme.desc: It's time for Ben and Ginger to tackle their second major project in their house, the master bedroom and bath. Although Ben is getting better with tools, Ginger realizes he can't be left alone when he almost blows the entire budget trying to cut tiles.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the Aloha State for the 'Iolani Fair. This school fundraiser fair in Honolulu features Hawaiian-style fried dough in the Malasada Ice Cream Sandwich and Sweet Roll Sliders.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Five: 1980-1989
programme.desc: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Gold Fever in Oregon
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman searches for a new claim in Oregon hoping to save his crew from losing their jobs. Meanwhile, Parker's crew reaches their boiling point after he orders them to move the washplant in a hurry.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Hunting for Thawed Ground
programme.desc: Parker tackles a frozen cut hoping to keep his lead over Todd. Meanwhile, Todd doubles down by buying a second monster washplant. Later, Tony's progress stalls after discovering a vital component of his operation is broken.

programme.desc: Former DEA agents break open a mysterious concrete box at a secret narco airstrip and dig for millions at a remote safehouse frequented by Pablo Escobar.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Historic Haul
programme.desc: In this mega-packed episode, Tony Beets breaks records with the biggest gold haul in Gold Rush history. Parker Schnabel battles to save his dream washplant, and after seven weeks at the Buckland, Todd Hoffman's finally on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Go Down Fighting
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman hits rock bottom when, after seven seasons, a key crew member quits. Tony Beets transforms some rusty relics into a monster power barge, and a troubled Parker Schnabel misses his own birthday party.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Game Over
programme.desc: With no paycheck for five weeks, members of Todd Hoffman's close-knit team turn on each other. Parker's gamble to run his washplant without protection from rocks proves costly. Tony builds a mega-trailer to move his barge, but gets his measurements wrong.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Abandonment
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman's crew has quit, and he desperately tries to keep mining with a skeleton team. Parker Schnabel carelessly breaks his truck's air hoses while transporting his washplant, and Tony Beets discovers his dredge is blowing gold out of the sluices.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Lifeline
programme.desc: The remnants of the Hoffman crew are at their lowest, but someone brings Todd good news. Tony Beets fires his barge captain, then runs aground up the mighty Yukon River. Rick Ness finally gets Parker Schnabel's second operation up and running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker vs. Rick
programme.desc: Rick outperforms Parker on his new Indian River claim. Tony's dredge suffers a catastrophic failure, threatening his season. Todd Hoffman's skeleton crew finally sees good gold at their new mine in Colorado.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Excavator Down
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman eats humble pie when he begs his old crew to return. Parker Schnabel loses an excavator in a swamp and Tony Beets gives his daughter Monica her own operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Rolling on the River
programme.desc: Todd opens a second Colorado operation hoping to find the gold he needs. Meanwhile, Parker tries out a new mechanic who fails to get approval from Mitch as Tony sets sail up the mighty Yukon river in a rented power-barge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Family Ties
programme.desc: Parker is forced to call his dad to help him get back to mining for gold. Todd's cousin helps the Hoffmans with the best clean-up of the season and Tony's daughter gets a little help from her brother to fix up her washplant.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: A Beaver in the Operation
programme.desc: Todd's entire operation is put on hold after a beaver dams his water supply. Later, Parker's new washplant becomes a nightmare after Brennan drives an excavator into a pond and Tony finally gets his dredge working.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Monsters on the Mountain
programme.desc: Todd goes up a mountain to look for new ground and returns with a handful of monster nuggets. Parker and Rick have conveyor issues while Tony and Monica pit their modern washplant against Kevin's 75-year old dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: A Dynamite Find
programme.desc: Todd uses explosive means to blast past monster boulders and to the gold that lies beneath. Later, Parker battles a flooded cut for a shot at an all-time record and Tony continues up the Yukon River in his massive power barge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Freezing Ground and Fistfights
programme.desc: As the crews face off in a final push before the big freeze, a bare-knuckle fight separates members of the Hoffman crew and Tony's plan to relocate stalls. Later, Parker confronts breakdowns while striving for his biggest score.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sample Sale Madness!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Quest for Perfection

programme.title: Mad Money

programme.desc: The Sharks tear into the business idea of a man who wants them to invest in a watch he claims provides health benefits. A stay-at-home mom is looking for support for her gourmet pretzel business.

programme.title: Shark Tank: Coffee Meets Bagel, SkinnyShirt, Doorman, Bantam Bage
programme.desc: Three sisters from San Francisco, California hope for a perfect match with the Sharks and their dating app that introduces singles to friends of friends.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An entrepreneur pitches a smart plate containing food recognition technology that could solve all your dieting problems. Also, a sweetener tastes like honey, but it's not made by bees.

programme.desc: A Milwaukee-based chain of soup restaurants has been struggling since its co-owner’s sudden passing. The remaining owner’s stubbornness and lack of business know-how are putting a strain on the company and its employees.

programme.title: The Profit: A. Stein Meat Products
programme.desc: Second generation business run by two friends, can their business be saved? This company has grown so fast, they are unable to track the 10s of 1000s of dollars that go in and out daily.

programme.title: The Profit: The Casery
programme.desc: A Los Angeles start-up is creating buzz with their fashion-forward cellphone cases. But behind their breathtaking sales and beautiful designs, the cracks are starting to show.

programme.title: The Profit: Skullduggery

programme.title: Dateline: Everything She Knew
programme.desc: A young woman's murder remains unsolved until someone comes forward to reveal her own harrowing story.

programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Science
programme.desc: Testing mice means wasted resources because what works on them often fails on humans. Scarce funding stops scientists from seeking cures, and there's no money in reproducing results, even though it's essential in proving findings.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Future
programme.desc: Unregulated food expiration dates lead to massive waste, your 401K won't be enough to support your retirement and the future is unpredictable.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins College

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Drugs

programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Hospital
programme.desc: Inflated hospital costs have created an unfair system, reckless antibiotic prescriptions makes them worthless, and you might not need a mammogram.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Dating
programme.desc: Adam swipes right on knowledge by exposing the flaws in dating sites. Plus, alpha males, and wolves, don't exist, and personality tests are a failure.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Two

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Three
programme.desc: In this special, Michael revisits some of the spookiest bits of Carbonaro past to reveal fresh frights with never-before-seen reactions to tricks, including the alien abduction, musical ghosts and mad science experiments gone wrong.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Four
programme.desc: Michael takes viewers behind the scenes and shows them never seen tricks.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Aztec Portal

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 5

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 7

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Inventions 11

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Smartest Inventions 12

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heather and immense deck and patio.

programme.desc: Joe and Lana want the best for their three young kids, but city living is costing them a fortune. With Joe working seven days a week to keep the family afloat, the couple is desperate for a new life in the suburbs.

programme.title: Buying and Selling With the Property Brothers: Move Out and Move On
programme.desc: With hectic work schedules, two kids under the age of four and a house that needs tons of work, fireman Dan and nurse Olivia are feeling the heat. Although they're desperate for a fresh new start, their current fixer-upper is holding them back.

programme.title: Buying and Selling With the Property Brothers: Shacking on Up
programme.desc: Nurse Jenna and firefighter Neil are ready to settle down in a home of their own, but first they have to flip his frat house. It's a fixer-upper that never happened, and now Jonathan's stepping in to transform the bachelor pad disaster into a showstopper.

programme.title: Buying and Selling With the Property Brothers: Small Budget, Big Sacrifices

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: All Hail the Queen
programme.desc: Motor yacht Sirocco braces for its most exclusive charter guest yet: The Queen of Versailles. João faces his old demons after a drunken night out as well as an increasingly defiant deck crew. A new third stew joins the boat who has Colin swooning.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: What Eze the Problem?
programme.desc: Hannah and Joao have a miscommunication over a guest excursion. In the galley, Anastasia is forced to prepare foods that go against her vegan lifestyle to please the charter guest, the 'Queen of Versailles.' June continues to struggle to impress Hannah.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Whole Different Ball Game
programme.desc: Baseball legend Johnny Damon comes on board with a group of his rowdiest friends making the crew work double-time. June struggles to keep her radio on, which leaves Hannah frustrated. Jack and Travis get in hot water when they fail to respond to an alarm.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Docked and Loaded
programme.desc: Captain Sandy continues her on-going battle with Sirocco's anchors, while Joao and Travis continue their deep dive to set the anchors free. Baseball star Johnny Damon and his family and friends deal with bad weather and a feisty yacht owner.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Monte Car-loco
programme.desc: The crew enjoys a day off at an exclusive resort in Monte Carlo, but some of them are faced with more than they bargained for. Joao and Hannah have a heart to heart, while June tries to open herself up to Hannah with not so favourable results.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry for Me, Sirocco
programme.desc: Captain Sandy finds one of the crew member's positions redundant. Joao finally confronts Jack on his lack of work ethic giving him an ultimatum. An overwhelmed Anastasia is pushed to her breaking point in the galley. Then, Colin makes a bold move.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's Ben a Long Time
programme.desc: Colin faces a tough decision and Anastasia accepts her new role, but Sandy wonders if she's now phoning her job in. An all-female group come on board and do their best to flirt with the deck crew. Jack and Aesha move in together.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Nauti Girls Need Love Too
programme.desc: Ben's first dinner doesn’t wow the guests as much as he had hoped leaving him questioning if he still has his sea legs. Anastasia has a hard time adjusting back to her old third stew role.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Holy Ship!
programme.desc: Ben is determined to regain his sea legs, but Sirocco's faulty galley has other plans. Travis' latest drunken night has Sandy at the end of her rope. Jack ups his romance game by writing poetry for Aesha.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Sweet White Glove O' Mine
programme.desc: The charter guests request a White Party for their final dinner, and Ben goes to great lengths in creating a menu for the theme. Joao's ego gets him in hot water with Captain Sandy, while Jack enlists the crew to help him ask Aesha to be his girlfriend.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Rockabilly Roadster

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tour de Pants
programme.desc: A customer is brought to tears when the shop presents him with a chopper dedicated to his lost mother. Later, Danny surprises his band member with a hippy van, while Mike and Scott race to settle a score.

programme.title: Counting Cars: You Talkin' to Me?
programme.desc: A Hollywood icon confronts Horny Mike and Roli in the shop parking lot. Danny tries to diffuse the situation before it gets explosive.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Change of Heart
programme.desc: Danny has a last-minute change of heart and can't let go of a classic car he promised to sell to a loyal customer. Later, Kevin and Scott try to score a bike on their own, while Danny ditches lunch for a vintage Cadillac.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: An eccentric couple wants to turn a 20-year-old ambulance into a ghost-hunting vehicle, which awakens a rogue spirit in the shop. Later, Danny is speechless over a tattooed customer's request.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Blackjack Bike
programme.desc: A casino VIP visits Count's Kustoms to commission a hi-end chopper build for a huge blackjack bonus prize. Plus, shop detailer Roli sets his sights on a jaw dropping chopper of his own.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Power and Glory
programme.desc: When Mark asks Danny to build a bike in memory of eight sailors who were lost while serving with him on the USS Belknap, Danny knows he must create something special in their honour. Later, Danny finds a beautiful, rare Corvette in a driveway.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Get Your Kicks
programme.desc: Danny takes on a Route 66-inspired Chevy for the famed highway's biggest fan, and later teams up with his good buddy, American Restoration's Rick Dale, on an unusual project for a customer.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Burning Out
programme.desc: Danny has big retro plans for a 1972 Cutlass he hopes to flip, and is counting on his fab team to do her right. Roli seeks the help of the guys to learn to do a burn-out. Danny checks out a 1971 Torino whose owner can't seem to put a price on it.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Don't Tell Danny
programme.desc: Mike buys a Smart car and wants to trick it out at the shop, but Kevin warns that Danny hates new cars and can't find out about it until it's done. Danny and Kevin go for a spin in Kevin's new Caddy and come across a 1939 Ford.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Full Monte
programme.desc: Inspired by the Rat Rods at a local shop, Danny sends the guys out to find parts for a Count's Kustoms Rat Rod. While on the hunt, Danny gets distracted by a beauty of a Bel Air.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Back in Time
programme.desc: Two brothers want to surprise their dad with the ultimate car guy gift: a fully restored 1957 Special Edition T-Bird that's been sitting in the family's pasture for many years. Mike and Ryan find an unusual car collector with some very unusual rides.

programme.title: Counting Cars: True Fire Fiasco
programme.desc: A memorial bike project poses a series of challenges for the paint team after builder Shannon doesn't get all the necessary information from the customer. Also, Danny stumbles upon a collection of seriously fast rides.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Get Your Motor Running
programme.desc: Danny and Shannon are in motorcycle heaven when they are asked to restore a rare 1957 Harley Davidson Pan head prototype.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Danny's New Truck
programme.desc: Danny charges Ryan with customizing a brand new Chevy Silverado for their most difficult customer-himself.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Dee's Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Twisted Sister's Dee Snider brings Danny and the gang a brand new BMW Z4 that he wants Count-ified for his wife Suzette as an anniversary present. A simple paint job turns to disaster when she is not happy with the finished product, not once, but twice.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Fast and the Ridiculous Part One
programme.desc: Ryan, Mike and Shannon convince Danny to sponsor them in a 24-hour endurance race called The LeMons. This race pits cheap hunks of junk against each other deep in the Arizona desert. Meanwhile, Danny has the guys work on a special one of a kind project.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Fast and the Ridiculous Part Two
programme.desc: The guys finally find a not so perfect car for the Arizona Lemons race; a beat up old racer, once owned by Shannon. With a little begging and very little cash they buy it back. Next they resurrect the Junker as the 'Counts Bloody Mess.'

programme.title: Counting Cars: Superfine Econoline
programme.desc: Danny makes an old Ford Econoline look so cool that, in the end, two buyers get into a bidding war for it. Danny can score big, but only if he can let his baby go. Also, Mike and Roli find a BMW motorcycle with a lot of history.

programme.desc: The Animal Kingdom is rife with deadly snakes.

programme.title: Snake Underworld

programme.title: Cobra Mafia
programme.desc: A snake family rules reptilian streets with impressive firepower and a fearsome reputation. Equipped with an array of deadly weapons and a bad attitude, the cobra family instils fear and chaos throughout the wilds of Africa and Asia.

programme.title: Anaconda: Silent Killer
programme.desc: The anaconda is a giant snake with a killer reputation, but also widely misunderstood. Join us on a journey to uncover the truth about one of the biggest yet most secretive snakes on Earth.

programme.title: Caught in the Act: Tiger Showdown
programme.desc: Tigers will go to great lengths, even kill, in order to gain dominance over other males.

programme.title: Caught in the Act: Elephant Rampage
programme.desc: Meet a couple that was charged by a wild elephant on a walking safari in Africa, and see the nail-biting video they took of the raging beast and the tour guide that saved them.

programme.title: Caught in the Act: There's a Bear in My Garage
programme.desc: See a male seahorse give birth to hundreds of babies. Then, find out what happens when a lion pride is charged by a hundred buffalo.

programme.title: Caught in the Act: Cannibal Shark
programme.desc: A shark fishing trip goes wrong when a hammerhead makes an unexpected appearance.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Giants: World's Largest Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The world's largest and most advanced cruise ship races against the clock to board thousands of passengers in Miami, and using new technology, an expert team navigates the behemoth ship through perilous waters.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Giants: US Navy Super Fleet
programme.desc: The world's toughest naval fleet are put to the test as cutting-edge aircraft carriers, combat ships, and amphibious assault vehicles and their crews undergo challenging warfare exercises.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Giants: Titans of Power
programme.desc: The world's biggest tidal turbine is a cutting-edge machine that can revolutionize the energy industry, but first, a crew of engineers must use the latest tech to battle dangerous tides and successfully install it.

programme.title: How It's Made: World's Toughest Rope
programme.desc: Rope is essential to the world's construction industry, and the process to make them requires cutting-edge technology and expert engineering.

programme.title: BattleBots: Reign of Terror
programme.desc: The competition heats up as the bots battle to claim the ultimate prize, and two world class undefeated bots go head-to-head in battle of total destruction.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sins of Ghost Vegas
programme.desc: An abandoned Vegas-style getaway with a deadly secret, a ghost town sinking into the earth, and a passenger train on a course for disaster are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong.

programme.title: BattleBots: Reign of Terror
programme.desc: The competition heats up as the bots battle to claim the ultimate prize, and two world class undefeated bots go head-to-head in battle of total destruction.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sins of Ghost Vegas
programme.desc: An abandoned Vegas-style getaway with a deadly secret, a ghost town sinking into the earth, and a passenger train on a course for disaster are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong.

programme.title: How It's Made: World's Toughest Rope
programme.desc: Rope is essential to the world's construction industry, and the process to make them requires cutting-edge technology and expert engineering.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Sun's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The latest discoveries reveal the mysterious and ever-changing nature of our Sun. Astronomers are only now beginning to understand the vast power of our giant star, and new ground-breaking investigations show it like never before.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Death of the Solar System
programme.desc: An exploration of the dramatic fate of our future descendants, the technology they'll need to survive the end of this world billions of years from now and our options for colonizing and starting again on a new planet somewhere far from Earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Time Travel Enigma
programme.desc: Recent discoveries in the cosmos are proving that time travel is less impossible than we think, while the newest discoveries in space and theoretical physics have us on the brink of cracking one of the universe's greatest puzzles.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Seven Earths
programme.desc: The new discovery of seven alien Earth-like planets in a faraway solar system is a major milestone in our hunt for extraterrestrial life, and experts investigate the secrets of TRAPPIST-1's mysterious worlds to reveal if we're truly alone in the universe.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Journey to Alien Earths
programme.desc: New discoveries of alien earths reveal vital clues in finding extraterrestrial life, using the latest science and technology, experts reveal the strange landscapes and oceans of these distant worlds.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mayan City of Blood
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, the lost city of Chichen Itza contains ancient secrets of a mysterious civilization. Follow the scientists working to find how the Chichen Itza was built and how the bloody rite of human sacrifice shaped the city.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Temples of the Jungle
programme.desc: New technologies reveal the startling truth behind the largest temple ever built, Angkor Wat. Accompany experts as they uncover how this colossal structure was constructed and why one of the largest cities in the world was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dark Secrets of the Pyramid
programme.desc: New evidence could help solve some of the Great Pyramid's greatest mysteries. Follow the investigation into how it was built, revealing the truth behind its hidden tombs and deepest secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Viking City of the Dead
programme.desc: When a mysterious Viking fortress lost underground for over a thousand years is discovered, experts investigate its buried treasures to reveal what caused the end of this fearsome civilization.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Maya
programme.desc: Deep in the jungle, the lost city of Tikal holds the dark secrets of the Maya, and now, a new investigation uncovers how it grew into a megacity home to 100,000 people, and why it was mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Blood Pyramids
programme.desc: Giant pyramids at a strange site in Mexico are revealing the bloody secrets of a mysterious civilization that vanished 1,400 years ago. Little is known about this lost culture, but new discoveries are uncovering shocking evidence of human sacrifice.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Female Forces: DUI's and Don'ts
programme.desc: A drunken male suspect gets a little rough; a public indecency suspect causes trouble.

programme.title: Female Forces: Ready to Rumble
programme.desc: The women of Naperville PD show just how tough they are as they combat out of control suspects including a kid who tries to charge one of the officers and a mother with a violent daughter seeking advice.

programme.title: Female Forces: Red Alert
programme.desc: Betsy, Julie and Tracy release some aggression and train for hand-to-hand combat with their nightstick batons. Officer Dawn Yorke deals with a belligerent homeless man accused of casing a parking lot for possible theft.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Messages from Beyond
programme.desc: A police officer calls Ron to help him uncover the mysteries surrounding his night job as a security officer at a banquet hall.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Meagan's Ghost
programme.desc: A concerned homeowner contacts CPD when her houseguest is choked in her sleep by an unseen force.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Stirring Up the Dead
programme.desc: The owner of a restaurant and bar, undergoing renovations, calls CPD for help when paranormal activity starts to scare away employees and brings construction to a halt.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Victim's Revenge
programme.desc: The team finds that a young girl's suicide in 1916 could have been a murder and that her aggressor is still hanging around the campus hoping to find his next victim.

programme.title: Female Forces: Crash Makeover
programme.desc: Betsy and Officer Julie Lardino convince Officer Tracy to undergo a head-to-toe makeover while still keeping the city safe.

programme.title: American Justice: Cops on Trial
programme.desc: Police officers and the general public are held to different standards of justice.

programme.title: Nightwatch: 105 and Rising
programme.desc: It's a hot and humid night in New Orleans, and as temperatures rise, violence erupts. Police chase two carjacking suspects. Keeley treats an injured young family. Titus and Dan respond to a call from a former Playboy bunny.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Not Today
programme.desc: Yonkers first responders face unexpected challenges when they respond to a call for a man with a broken ankle who fell from a fire escape. In Tucson, Steven and Sam are called to a structure fire and must search inside for possible victims.

programme.title: Model Killers: Finger-Licking Good/ Slaying of a Tennessee Beauty Queen
programme.desc: A woman meets the perfect man to launch her modeling career, but is soon faced with a brutal reality. A beautiful farm girl moves to the city to pursue her modeling dreams, but winds up living a nightmare.

programme.title: Model Killers: Reality Kills
programme.desc: Three passionate, attractive men - and some very adoring fans - lust after a swimsuit model with a heart of gold.

programme.title: Model Killers: Model Murderer/ Strangled Beauty
programme.desc: An ambitious male model with a physique to die for is about to become an international sensation -- but not in a way he could have foreseen.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams debate infamous crimes and legal cases.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Casey Anthony
programme.desc: World famous prosecutor, Marcia Clark, investigates the bone chilling, unresolved death of toddler Caylee Anthony to see if the beautiful little girl was murdered by her own mother.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Single Mom Missing
programme.desc: 31-year-old mother of two Michelle Warner vanishes without a trace from her apartment in Houston that she shares with her ex. With no concrete proof of anything untoward, police are left with a hunch that her checkered past has reared its ugly head.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who's Missing Now
programme.desc: When beloved young waitress Zilpha Lowery goes missing, foul play is immediately suspected. Rumors of her fate drift through town and tie her to another mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Friendly Foes
programme.desc: The double homicide of a young mother and her 21-month-old daughter sends Galax's tiny police force on a frenzied mission to stop unspeakable evil in its tracks.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Trailing the Devil
programme.desc: A nightmare wreaks havoc on the village of Armada, Michigan when 14-year-old April Millsap is found murdered on the community's most popular bike trail. Very little evidence leaves investigators running down clues to bring this monster to justice.

programme.title: Murder on the Mountain
programme.desc: While working at a ranch in Montana for the summer, 22-year-old Kari Swenson trains for a biathlon. Her routine run through the woods suddenly leads to a dead end, where she comes across two mountain men with a twisted plan to take her prisoner.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Impossible Perpetrator
programme.desc: When teen Candace Hiltz is shot dead in Prison Valley, the cops pursue her troubled brother James. With no evidence against him, the case goes cold until ten years later when a cop's storage unit is discovered to contain evidence in Candace's murder.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Absent Father
programme.desc: When Jim Durgan's body is found in Prison Valley, no one knows why. His estranged wife is drawing a blank and his out-of-state girlfriend can't explain it. What follows is a murky investigation that unravels a sinister and cleverly staged murder plot.

programme.title: Murder on the Mountain
programme.desc: While working at a ranch in Montana for the summer, 22-year-old Kari Swenson trains for a biathlon. Her routine run through the woods suddenly leads to a dead end, where she comes across two mountain men with a twisted plan to take her prisoner.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Impossible Perpetrator
