programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: The plaintiff says she was struck by the defendant, resulting in car damages and medical expenses; the defendants say it was another car's fault. Then, dancing partners are in a legal batter over unpaid airfare, lodging, and a ticket for a cruise.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Mike Snores
programme.desc: Molly gets annoyed when she spends all of her time at Mike's apartment, and insists he spend a night at her place.

programme.title: Mom: Cinderella and a Drunk MacGyver
programme.desc: Christy tries to help Julian, a handsome, newly sober AA member but her attraction to him complicates things. Meanwhile, Bonnie jumps at the chance to attend a lavish charity gala with Jill.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Pistol-Packin' Hermaphrodite
programme.desc: Wedding bells loom as Charlie and Mia make their wedding plans, but when their families meet, things immediately begin to fall apart. Ultimately, Charlie and his bride-to-be end up deciding on a small ceremony in Vegas.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Talk
programme.desc: Dre, disappointed that Bow has already given Andre Jr. 'the talk' because she thinks he's too big of a prude to do it, decides to rectify matters by giving his son his version of 'the talk.'

programme.title: Black-ish: R-E-S-P-E-C-T
programme.desc: Dre and Bow confront gender biases of their own after finding out that both Junior and Zoey have become sexually active. Meanwhile, Ruby is hurt when she finds out that Jack and Diane have been hanging out with a friend's grandmother after school.

programme.title: Riverdale: Chapter Fifty-Eight: In Memoriam
programme.desc: As the residents of Riverdale prepare for its upcoming Independence Day parade, Archie gets a call that will change his life forever.

programme.title: Nancy Drew: Pilot
programme.desc: When a socialite is murdered, Nancy finds herself a prime suspect in the crime along with a group of teens present at the scene. The five of them must team up to clear their names.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross's New Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rachel anxiously waits for Ross at the airport in order to tell him that she loves him.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Bris
programme.desc: George gets a great parking spot at a hospital. Kramer thinks he has discovered a 'pig man.' Elaine and Jerry are nervous about their religious duties when they agree to become godparents.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Mike the Tease
programme.desc: Mike studies male fertility and visits a clinic to ensure that his swimmers are up to the task of starting a family with Molly. Meanwhile, Vince gets a new job selling vacuum cleaners door-to-door.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Working for Caligula
programme.desc: Now that newlywed Alan has moved out, Charlie returns to his bachelor lifestyle.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: I Rode a Hoverboard!
programme.desc: Adam breaks his arm and exaggerates at school that he fell off of a hover board just like in the 'Back to the Future' movie.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: A Kick-Ass Risky Business Party
programme.desc: Lainey, Erica and Barry plan a big 'Risky Business' inspired party at her home, just like the movie, while Lainey's dad is out of town. Later, when the party gets out of control, Beverly jumps to the rescue.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the One Night Stands
programme.desc: Max accompanies Caroline on a trip to visit her father in prison.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: The Black People Episode
programme.desc: Melanie and Tasha's feud finds a public forum. Jason meets Chardonnay's friends who open his eyes to the racism in the world that fame has blinded him to. Derwin tries to get Kwan to follow his lead socially in hopes that it will translate to the field.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Helen Potts
programme.desc: Mike butts heads with his new but noisy neighbour, Helen Potts, for waking up the neighbours with her power tools and fix-it projects. But when Vanessa and Helen become fast friends, Mike decides to interfere.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Minniear vs. Carter

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: She Tried to Steal My Fiancee
programme.desc: A wedding is postponed after a bachelorette party.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Guests appear to expose their outrageous stories, from kinky relationships to crazy obsessions.

programme.title: Judge Mathis

programme.title: The People's Court

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A cyclists is suing after being struck by a motorist; the motorist says the cyclist was reckless. Then, a 'ladies' man' says his jealous ex-girlfriend destroyed his property and reputation. The ex-girlfriend says he sent several women to beat her up.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Needs a DNA Test
programme.desc: Alana is 17 years old and just had a baby, but her boyfriend Noah denies being the son's father. Next, Damien is convinced that Natasha cheated on him, and both of her children are not his.

programme.title: Maury: Did You Lie to Me For 25 Years? Is This Man My Dad?
programme.desc: Jasmine's mom and aunt say Vincent is not her father, but Jasmine is certain he is. Mike and his wife Sarah want to prove to Terry, his fiancée Michelle and his son TJ that Terry is his father; Michelle and TJ say Mike and Sarah are using them.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I Want a Happy Ending
programme.desc: Romell wants to re-kindle a relationship with his high-school sweetheart Tayler. Tayler is in a relationship with Austin, but Romell still wants his woman.

programme.title: Maury

programme.title: Movie: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Fockers

programme.title: Movie: My Big Fat Greek Wedding

programme.desc: The black sheep of a mob family pretends to be a thug to help his dad infiltrate the FBI.
